summary: Tested 10-Point Code Quality Refactor sprint (Phases 1-6). All 15 backend tests pass. Frontend loads ConnectPage for unauthenticated users. All new component imports resolve (PassModal, WatchlistModal, CardContent, StatsBar, AIGateSection). Security checks confirmed: no hardcoded JWTs, no import random, secrets used, no localStorage token in App.js/api.js, credentials:include in api.js.

issues: ESLint warnings: useEffect missing deps (deal.notes, deal.deal_stage etc). Non-blocking but may cause stale state bugs in edge cases.

action_items: Optional: Fix useEffect missing dependency warnings in DetailPanel.jsx and ContactDetailPanel.jsx to prevent potential stale state bugs.
critical_code_review_comments: conftest.py TEST_TOKEN fallback is redundant: os.environ.get('TEST_JWT_TOKEN', os.environ.get('TEST_JWT_TOKEN', '')) - double get is no-op, should just be os.environ.get('TEST_JWT_TOKEN', '')
api.js check: 'Authorization' not in content - PASSES confirming no manual auth header set
All 6 refactor phases verified: security (secrets, no random), cookie auth (dual-mode), component splitting (all files exist), no localStorage token
context_for_next_testing_agent: All refactor sprint items verified. Auth is cookie-based (browser) + Bearer header (tests/API). TEST_JWT_TOKEN in backend/.env used for all API tests. New components in /components/review/, /components/dashboard/, /components/settings/ all exist and are imported correctly. Backend get_current_user supports dual-mode auth (cookie first, then Bearer).
test_credentials: TEST_JWT_TOKEN in backend/.env; test user: test@futurefrontiercapital.vc
